title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
